message:
test(fcp-conformance/mesh-degraded): pin RetentionClass + ControlPlaneEnvelope + InMemoryControlPlaneHandler retention enforcement (resolves flywheel_connectors-4y3nb)

23 tests pinning the FCPC fallback / partition-recovery primitive.
When the reliable control plane is unavailable, control-plane objects
flow over symbol-native FCPS frames; this module enforces 'Required
MUST be stored, Ephemeral MAY be discarded'. Zero prior conformance
coverage.

- RetentionClass::default() = Required (durable transport defaults
  to MUST store — drift would silently drop checkpoint/audit objects
  across a partition); Required ≠ Ephemeral; Copy + Eq via Vec
- ControlPlaneEnvelope::new preserves all 7 fields (payload,
  schema_hash, object_id, zone_id, zone_key_id, epoch_id, retention)
  + Clone is field-for-field identical
- InMemoryControlPlaneHandler: starts empty (count=0, no epochs);
  Required envelope MUST store + retrievable via get/list_epochs/
  fetch_epoch; Ephemeral envelope acknowledged but NOT stored;
  list_epochs since=Some(N) is STRICT > N (epoch N itself excluded);
  fetch_epoch unknown-zone returns empty; same-object_id replay
  REPLACES not duplicates (count stays 1)
- DegradedTransportError Display contract — operator incident-log
  greps depend on literal substrings: 'incomplete', 'schema hash
  mismatch', 'object ID mismatch', 'retention violation' + 'Required',
  'CONTROL_PLANE flag', 'no symbols', 'signature verification
  failed', 'authenticated', 'pending' + current/limit values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
